chunks.title: Jeremiah and the Rechabites
chunks.reason: Narrative account of Jeremiah bringing the Rechabites to the temple and their refusal of wine.

chunks.title: Judah's Failure Compared to Rechabites
chunks.reason: Yahweh's oracle contrasting the obedience of the Rechabites with Judah's disobedience.

chunks.title: Promise to the Rechabites
chunks.reason: Jeremiah's declaration of Yahweh's promise regarding the lineage of Jonadab.
